title: Model profile (fleet schema; Contract 3/7 input)
description: Describes one served model for capacity modeling (fleetlab). PROVENANCE IS MANDATORY AND STRUCTURAL: every quantitative fact is a provenanced value object ({value, provenance}) — a bare number is not schema-valid, so fabricated defaults are not expressible. Identity fields (profile id, checkpoint id, revision, tokenizer id) are identities, not measurements, and carry no provenance; the checkpoint REVISION pin is mandatory because token counts and performance are comparable only under identical model identity (benchmark comparability rule).

version.description: Profile version; bump when any value changes (profiles are pinned by consumers).

revision.description: Exact revision pin (commit hash); mandatory for comparability.

weights_size_gb.description: On-disk/in-VRAM weight size for the stated quantization.

kv_cache_bytes_per_token.description: KV-cache footprint per token for the stated KV dtype; drives concurrency-vs-VRAM capacity modeling.

active.description: Quantization this profile's values were established under (null = none). A different quantization is a different profile.

provenance.description: MANDATORY provenance: how this value was established and when. basis=measured: from an identified measurement (source = benchmark result_id or measurement artifact). basis=source-reported: from an identified external source (model card, config.json, paper). basis=assumed: an explicit assumption — never a silent default; state the reasoning in notes.

source.description: REQUIRED for measured and source-reported values: what produced or reported the value.
